overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima featuring a samurai character exploring a steamy hot spring environment. The character walks along stone paths, crosses wooden bridges over turquoise pools, and traverses dense bamboo forests toward traditional Japanese structures perched on coastal cliffs.

scene_state.functional_zone: hot spring bathing path between cliff and pool

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a narrow path beside a steaming hot spring pool

notable_agents.action: bathing in the hot spring water near the wooden dock

entered.detail: steaming turquoise water with bathers relaxing inside
tall rock face covered in dense green ivy and moss
wooden platform extending over the water where NPCs are bathing

segments.scene_description: The samurai walks along a narrow dirt trail squeezed between a steaming turquoise hot spring on the left and an ivy-covered stone cliff on the right. Several NPCs are visible bathing in the water near a wooden dock, while mist rises from the pool surface.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden bridge over hot spring with view of traditional building

events.description: steps onto wooden bridge crossing over the hot spring pool
stops walking and rotates camera to survey the hot spring and traditional architecture

agents.ego_description: crossing the wooden bridge and pausing to observe the traditional building and steaming pools

entered.detail: planked walkway with bamboo railings spanning the hot spring
dark wooden structure with curved tile roof and warm lit windows
traditional stone toro lanterns lining the edge of the pool

segments.scene_description: The character crosses a wooden bridge over the steaming water, approaching a traditional Japanese building with a curved roof. After reaching the center of the bridge, the character stops and pans the camera to survey the scene, revealing stone lanterns and the full extent of the hot spring complex.

events.description: turns away from hot spring and enters dense bamboo forest path

agents.ego_description: walking along a winding dirt path through tall bamboo groves

entered.detail: dense stand of tall green bamboo stalks lining both sides of the trail
wooden cart with hanging goods and a lit paper lantern

segments.scene_description: Leaving the hot spring behind, the character enters a dense bamboo forest where the path becomes a dirt trail. The steam dissipates as the character walks deeper into the green bamboo groves, eventually approaching a merchant's cart with hanging wares.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal cliff overlook with wooden structures

events.description: ascends wooden stairs toward cliff overlook
reaches cliff edge with bright view of distant bridge and ocean

agents.ego_description: walking up wooden stairs past a merchant and approaching a traditional house near the cliff edge

notable_agents.action: merchant standing beside cart with goods

entered.detail: log stairs ascending the rocky cliffside
steep cliff with view of ocean, distant bridge, and bright sky
traditional wooden dwelling with thatched roof surrounded by trees

segments.scene_description: The character passes the merchant and ascends wooden stairs toward a cliff overlook, where bright sunlight reveals a stunning view of the ocean and a distant bridge. The path continues to a traditional wooden house nestled among trees at the edge of the cliff.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a misty, secluded hot spring sanctuary into a bright, open coastal overlook. It begins with the samurai walking a narrow trail between a steaming turquoise pool and an ivy-covered cliff, passing bathers resting near a wooden dock. As the character crosses a wooden bridge, the camera pans to reveal the full extent of the hot spring complex and its stone lanterns before the path leads away from the steam and into a dense, green bamboo forest. The scene then shifts as the character passes a merchant's cart and ascends wooden stairs, causing the mist to dissipate entirely in favor of bright sunlight. Finally, the camera opens up to a stunning ocean vista and a distant bridge, following the path toward a traditional wooden house perched on the cliff's edge.
